entity.summary: Non-custodial Bitcoin exchange and liquidity infrastructure combining native Bitcoin buy/sell routing, bridging and settlement orchestration with a modular DEX stack and Spark-based exchange activity.
entity.notes: Current first-party website describes non-custodial Bitcoin buy and sell infrastructure, native Bitcoin liquidity, routing, bridging, settlement, market access, API orchestration, and documentation. DefiLlama independently classifies Flashnet as a Bitcoin modular exchange stack and AMM DEX and reports current Spark-chain DEX volume.

evidence.title: Flashnet official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website describes non-custodial Bitcoin buy and sell infrastructure, native Bitcoin liquidity, routing, bridging, settlement, Markets and Orchestra products, and API-based orchestration.

evidence.title: Introducing Flashnet
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation provides the Flashnet product and exchange-infrastructure introduction and links developer resources for current use.

evidence.title: Flashnet DEX volume and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry classifies Flashnet as an AMM DEX and modular exchange stack for Bitcoin and reports current and cumulative DEX volume on Spark.
